name: FutuRe Asia Reinsurance
description: Asian reinsurance operations across APAC markets

content.name: FutuRe Asia Reinsurance
content.description:
Asian reinsurance operations covering treaty and facultative business across Asia-Pacific markets. Headquartered in Tokyo with offices in Singapore, Hong Kong, and Sydney.

**Data Products:**
- [Local Lines of Business](/FutuRe/AsiaRe/LineOfBusiness) — 8 LoBs in JPY
- [Analysis Cube](/FutuRe/AsiaRe/Analysis/AnnualReport) — Local P&L aggregation
- [Mapping Rules](/FutuRe/AsiaRe/TransactionMapping/MappingRules) — Maps local LoBs to 10 Group LoBs

**Data Flow:** Cashflows → Lines of Business → Analysis Cube → [Transaction Mapping](/FutuRe/TransactionMapping) → Group Consolidation
